evals.prompt: Get the text from this video: https://youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
evals.expected_output: Full transcript of the video printed as plain text

evals.prompt: What is this video about? Give me a brief summary: https://youtu.be/jNQXAC9IVRw
evals.expected_output: A summary of the video based on the extracted transcript

evals.prompt: I need subtitles from this video in srt format, save to a file: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
evals.expected_output: SRT file saved to disk with proper SRT formatting
